name: GPU2D Mobile UI
description: Data-driven, interactive mobile UI rendered through Rae's GPU2D/WebGPU path (SDL3-backed gpu2d window). ECS component tables, a featured album card + scrollable track list, iOS-style scroll physics (drag/wheel/momentum/rubber-band), a hybrid busy/idle render loop, theme-driven text, and tappable bottom-nav tabs that switch screens. Compiled-target only.
